steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “a safe guess would have placed him somewhere in the debatable ground between forty and fifty.” The word “placed” describes what an estimate does—it positions someone at a location on a scale.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is to form a judgment about where something falls.

Estimated directly captures this sense, expressing a reasoned guess about position.

The other three choices describe different actions (changing, arranging, enlisting) that don't fit assessing age.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
